sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kei Topa a hing ei ve, Tu'n zong leitungah om,
A hin kik ken thei gi ge, Mi te'n bang gen ta leh;
A mah'n hong hehpih thei a, hong hopih na ka za
A mah ka sap lai takin hong nai gi ge.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hing e (hing e) hing e (hing e) hong hon khazih Topa,
Hong tonpih-a, hong hopih hi, ka paina khempeuh ah,
Hing e (hing e) hing e mihing hon khia Topa,
Bang ka ci theih hiam nong cih leh,
Ka lung sungah hing hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka kiim Leitung mun khempeuh ah hong itna ka mu,
Lung khamna ka thuak zel hang,
Ka lung kiangei kei ding,
Huihpi nuna tengah,
Amah'n hong kha ken ka thei,
A mah hong kilat ding, hong tung ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nuam un, nuam un Zeisu mi, lung dam in la sa un,
Hin tawntung Hallelujah,
Zeisu Khazih Kumpi,
Muan na tawh a zong mi ten,
A mah mu thei ding uh,
Tua bang itna a nei mi dang om ngei kei.
